en: I'm curious what the reaction has been to you being trans in the military.
ko: 군에서 트랜스젠더에 대한 반응이 어땠는지 궁금해요

en: I received an outpouring of support when I came out. They're my family and they have my back. At the end of the day, all anybody cares about is whether I can perform my job when I have that uniform on.
ko: 군에서 트랜스젠더에 대한 반응이 어땠는지 궁금해요 커밍아웃했을 때 엄청난 지지를 받았어요 가족이고 제 뒤를 봐줘요 결국 군복 입으면 임무를 수행할 수 있느냐가 중요해요 존중해주는 동료가 있으면 좋겠네요 군에서 트랜스젠더에 대한 반응이 어땠는지 궁금해요 커밍아웃했을 때 엄청난 지지를 받았어요 가족이고 제 뒤를 봐줘요 결국 군복 입으면 임무를 수행할 수 en: It must be nice to have respectful co-workers. I work with this guy Rodney, he's a total dick.
ko: 군복 입으면 임무를 수행할 수 있느냐가 중요해요 존중해주는 동료가 있으면 좋겠네요 저는 로드니라는 놈이랑 일해요 완전 나쁜 놈 그냥 나쁜 놈이에요 군 내부에서 상관없다면 왜

en: He's just a dick. So if the people in the military itself don't care, then why did the administration impose an executive order stating this?

en: An adoption of a gender identity inconsistent with an individual's sex conflicts with a soldier's commitment to an honorable, truthful, and disciplined lifestyle.

en: I was named an honor graduate at basic training, so I would say at least someone out there agrees that I have some honor and some discipline in me.

en: Would you leak war plans on Signal? Are you that disciplined? I don't have any plans to do so. Good to know.
